name: Old-Fashioned Peach Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Lightly grease an 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish.
Combine brown sugar, cinnamon, lemon rind and juice in a large bowl. Add peaches; toss to mix. Transfer to prepared baking dish.
2. Combine flours and baking powder on a piece of waxed paper. Beat together butter and sugar in a medium-sized bowl until light and fluffy. Beat in egg whites. Add dry ingredients alternately with milk and vanilla, stirring just to combine. Drop batter by spoonfuls over peach mixture; spread gently.
3. Bake in preheated 375°F oven for 25 to 30 minutes or until peaches are tender and crust is golden brown. Serve warm.
